3297420.name: SBMFR
3297420.description:
The client for "SBMFR"

NOTE this game uses dedicated servers. you can find the dedicated server builds here: Alternatively you can use the Server Browser ui to see if there are any available servers. (currently there is 1 official server)

any problems feel free to visit the discord channel or the reddit page and I can help.

features include:

A level editor 

replay system

lots of settings to play around on a per team basis

On a steamdeck I had to go to properties -> compatability.                                                    then check "force the use of a specific Steam Play compatability tool" then select           "Steam Linux Runtime 1.0 (scout)" I also had to change the resolotion setting to 1920x1080
